programs.title: Judy Justice
programs.sub_title: Neighborhood Dog Attack; Cancun Vacation Drama
programs.desc: Neighbors dispute liability when a mini Schnauzer is allegedly attacked by a large Cane Corso; the risk of owning potentially vicious dog breeds comes into play; ex-lovers fight over the cost of a failed trip to Cancun.
